So, the main task here is evaluating the air that people breathe, not just specific pollutants. Looking at the options: A) To focus on cancer-causing substances. The article does mention that IARC classifies carcinogens, but the specific task mentioned here is evaluating the air in general, not just focusing on substances. B) To evaluate the air quality. The quote directly says their task was to evaluate the air everyone breathes. This seems to align with option B. C) To study the developing risk of cancer.
